actions.description: Run a command on remote machine with SSH
actions.label: Block_IP
actions.name: run_ssh_command

parameters.name: host
parameters.example: # IP endpoint/agent yang terdampak, diisi otomatis dari alert Wazuh

parameters.description: A port on which SSH service is running
parameters.name: port

parameters.description: Password for SSH user. Use either password or private key.
parameters.name: password
command
parameters.example:
# Skenario: DDoS — blok IP sumber serangan
# Variabel $exec.all_fields.data.srcip diisi otomatis dari alert Wazuh

actions.description: Run a command on remote machine with SSH
actions.label: Delete_Files
actions.name: run_ssh_command

parameters.name: host
parameters.example: # IP endpoint/agent yang terdampak, diisi otomatis dari alert Wazuh

parameters.description: A port on which SSH service is running
parameters.name: port

parameters.description: Password for SSH user. Use either password or private key.
parameters.name: password
command
parameters.example:
# Hapus file yang termodifikasi oleh attacker
# $exec.all_fields.syscheck.path = path file yang terdeteksi berubah oleh Wazuh FIM

actions.description: Run a command on remote machine with SSH
actions.label: Restore_from_Backup
actions.name: run_ssh_command

parameters.name: host
parameters.example: # IP endpoint/agent yang terdampak, diisi otomatis dari alert Wazuh

parameters.description: A port on which SSH service is running
parameters.name: port

parameters.description: Password for SSH user. Use either password or private key.
parameters.name: password
command
parameters.example:
# Restore file dari backup server kamu
# Ganti:
#   YOUR_BACKUP_SERVER_IP  = IP server backup
#   YOUR_BACKUP_PORT       = port server backup (contoh: 8080)
#   /path/to/backup/file   = path file backup yang akan direstore

actions.description: Run a command on remote machine with SSH
actions.label: Restart_Web_Server
actions.name: run_ssh_command

parameters.name: host
parameters.example: # IP endpoint/agent yang terdampak, diisi otomatis dari alert Wazuh

parameters.description: A port on which SSH service is running
parameters.name: port

parameters.description: Password for SSH user. Use either password or private key.
parameters.name: password
command
parameters.example:
# Jalankan kembali web server setelah proses remediation selesai
# Ganti "apache2" dengan nama service web server kamu (nginx, httpd, dll)

value_replace.value: Berhasil menjalankan respon insiden Denial of Service - Blok IP Source menggunakan Iptables - Restart Web Server

parameters.description: Check if you want to verify request
parameters.name: ssl_verify

parameters.description: Choose if we should write the result straight to a file or not
parameters.name: to_file

value_replace.value: Berhasil menjalankan respon insiden Web Defacement - Stop Web Server - Hapus file asing - Restore file website dari backup server - Restart Web Server
